mentions.note: Fastest-growing pharma; but J&J spin-off more attractive on valuation uplift potential from low-growth business separation.
Opened AI-drug facility with Nvidia; obesity drug leader; still gold standard in GLP-1 market; CEO Dave Rex presented at JPMorgan Healthcare Conference.
GLP-1 play; higher P/E multiple; money managers passing on it in pullback scenario; deserves strength but too risky in weak economy thesis.
CEO Dave Rich (Kramer's favorite); oral GLP-1 launching spring 2026; potential beneficiary if Trump tariffs Novo Nordisk's Ozempic; strong competitive position.
Cramer's favorite pharma CEO Dave Rich; Eli Lilly launching oral GLP-1 in spring 2026; not going against owning Novo but bullish on Lilly competition in GLP-1 space.
Dominating GLP-1 market with strong pill form pipeline. David Ricks executing flawlessly. Preferred over Novo Nordisk in caller discussion.
Stock driven by GLP-1 clinical trial reports, not earnings; potential for new data announcement to get stock rolling.
GLP-1 powerhouse gaining share vs. Novo Nordisk; joint venture with Nvidia for hard-to-treat diseases; soared 10%+ on trial pipeline expansion.
Pharmaceutical company excels at drug innovation and development; GLP-1/obesity drug portfolio strong; better thesis than Novo Nordisk's price-cutting approach.
Biotech leader; Cramer cited as peer exception to Regeneron (implies strong position). Paired with Regeneron as superior drug stock.
Caller James up 20%, took house's money; Cramer says hold, won't sell. Core holding, will buy more on dips. Long-term conviction.
Co-innovation lab with Nvidia on digital biology and drug discovery; AI-driven life sciences could extend human longevity; beneficiary of Nvidia's inference and agent platform expansion.
Temporary 'giving-up-edness' on market favorite. GLP-1 pill gigantic; next-gen drugs still massive catalysts. Buy on weakness.
In 'giving-up-edness' moment on GLP-1 pill; one of greatest drug companies in history; GLP-1 and orals will be huge; buy on weakness.

Tirzepatide pill FDA approval game-changer: only GLP-1 takeable anytime without food/water, nearly injection-strength, $25/mo insured; beats Novo pill on convenience. Synaptic acquisition ($7.8B) for orexin (narcolepsy/addiction/mood disorder treatment). Weight loss pill blockbuster potential. Kept in Charitable Trust. Attacking hard-to-treat illnesses few attempt; funding from weight loss drug profits; Nvidia partnership for AI-discovery of intractables.
Weight loss drug disappointment; stock sold off big. Calm down—Lilly will tell good story Thursday. Longer-term view than 10 days.

GLP-1 pill Zounandea exceeding expectations with 20K+ users and strong demand despite late start; astounded market with fantastic quarter; strong for economy but healthcare not good stock market indicator.
Cramer did extensive research and is ready to roll; real bull market opportunity; very high conviction GLP-1 obesity drug platform and pipeline.
Pharma winner today; among sectors benefiting from rotation out of overheated data center names; healthcare sector solid.

Diabetes/weight-loss GLP-1 drugs surging; new retatrutide weight-loss data excellent (fat reduction without muscle loss); gene-therapy cholesterol breakthrough. Only pharma to crack trillion-dollar club; brilliant management.

Multiple GLP-1 formulations; pending drug sheds fat without muscle loss, offering potential knockout punch vs. Novo Nordisk if approved. Concern: overlap with Gtech growth holders may cause volatility.

Retatrutide shows superior weight loss; VERVE-102 gene therapy potential one-time cholesterol treatment; vaccine acquisitions diversify beyond GLP-1; CVS deal expands access; robust core pharma portfolio.
Cramer favorite; only healthcare bright spot for months; healthcare sector now broadening beyond just Lilly.
Earnings and drugs coming through; momentum building; massive GLP-1 production capacity built out; Cramer wants huge position for his charitable trust.
Earnings coming through, GLP-1 drugs ramping, new factories built; want huge position; stay in stock despite high share price.
Strong pharmaceutical company with superior growth profile; growth rate justifies premium valuation relative to peers.
Cited as one of the great momentum stocks requiring forward-looking price targets; GLP-1 sales opportunity extends through end of decade, justifying premium multiples.

Co-innovation lab with Nvidia applies AI to digital biology and drug discovery; Jensen Wang highlighted Lilly as the leading AI-in-science partner, with models trained to understand biology rather than just language.
